name: quantumpulseloader
title: Quantum Pulse Loader
description: A "God-Tier" Text Loader inspired by sci-fi holographic interfaces. Features: - Holographic Scanning: A radiant light beam reveals typographic details. - Multi-stage Logic: Cycles through sequences of status messages. - Chromatic Aberration: Deep cyan/magenta pulse on transitions. - Elastic Pulse: Subsurface text jitter for a "Neural" feel.
